facts.context: Which would most help pollinators find flowers that are pollinated at night?
Four students tried to find out which magnet was the strongest. They each shared one idea. Which idea shows scientific thinking?
facts.truth: We can measure the strength of the magnets.
distractors: We can pick the longest magnet.
We can pick the heaviest magnet.
We can vote for the magnet that we think is the strongest.

facts.context: Silica sand is a resource used in large volume in Nevada. This resource is used to make which product?
Which of these best describes the function of the skeletal system?
facts.truth: supports and protects tissues and organs
distractors: transports oxygen and nutrients throughout the body
removes harmful wastes from the cells of the body
breaks down food into a form that cells can use

facts.context: Nevada mines produce greater quantities of a particular resource than any other state. What resource is produced from these mines?
Which of these is a threat to the survival of an ecosystem?
facts.truth: a shrinking variety of animal and plant species
distractors: less biomass at higher levels of the food web

facts.context: A few types of birds live in the same ecosystem. Which of these characteristics would most likely affect how they compete with each other for food?
distractors: the types of nests they build

Which of the following is a part of the process of sexual reproduction?
As a river enters a larger body of water, sediments are deposited over a wide area. Which of these landforms is likely to be formed at the site of deposition?
About how long is a lunar cycle?
Which is an advantage of sexual reproduction in the survival of a population?
What can be inferred from a food product advertisement that claims "30% less fat than our leading competitors"?
facts.truth: The fat content of the item is reduced.
distractors: It will help a person lose weight.
It is the healthiest choice available.

The discovery of tectonic plates and the cause of their movement is best described as a result of which scientific procedure?
facts.truth: inquiry into the causes of observed geological phenomena
distractors: direct observation of the important properties of the Earth system
controlled laboratory experimentation on a simulation of geological systems
methodical testing of a valid hypothesis statement

How do muscles and bones work together to create body movement?
facts.truth: The muscles pull on the bones.
distractors: Muscles grow at the same rate as bones.
Muscles send electrical impulses to bones.

facts.context: Biologists moved a predator from sea level to a higher altitude, where they noticed that the predator became tired more quickly. If this predator had to live at a higher altitude, which adaptation would be necessary for it to survive?
facts.truth: production of more red blood cells

facts.context: A scientist crosses two different varieties of corn to produce a single variety that has traits from both parents. This technique is an example of
A class measures the time it takes for two different trucks to drive across the parking lot. How can they tell which truck is faster?
facts.truth: The truck that takes less time is faster.
distractors: The truck that starts moving first is faster.
The truck that has bigger tires is faster.
The truck that takes more time is faster.

facts.context: Which is the most important reason for scientists to publish their data and findings that result from a scientific investigation?
facts.truth: to allow other scientists to try to replicate their results
distractors: to get paid for their research
to gain respect from their peers in the scientific community

facts.context: A blacksmith bends a metal rod into a round wheel. Which statement best describes the wheel?
facts.truth: The wheel is made of the same substance as the rod.
distractors: The wheel weighs less than the rod.
The wheel weighs more than the rod.
The wheel is made of a different substance than the rod.

facts.context: A metal spoon and a wooden spoon are used to stir a pot of hot soup. After a few minutes, the metal spoon feels hotter than the wooden spoon. What explains this?
facts.truth: Metal conducts heat better than wood.
distractors: Metal is always hotter than wood.
Metal conducts electricity better than wood.
Metal heats up the water better than the wood.
